items.title: Airport and reserve reliability Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve airport and reserve trip predictability by strengthening constrained-zone dispatch, pickup guidance, and scheduled-trip orchestration.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce ETA error on airport and reserve trips.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase higher-confidence premium and airport trip mix.

productBricks.change: Extend scheduling and constrained-zone orchestration logic.
Improve pickup guidance and ETA models.
Improve rematch and supply allocation for reserve and airport flows.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduce reserve and airport flow updates in rider and driver apps.

items.title: Driver trust and earnings clarity Initiative
items.description: Focused investment to improve driver productivity and retention by making payouts, compliance, and support outcomes easier to understand and trust.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase productive earnings and reduce wasted active time.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Improve supply resilience in priority markets.

productBricks.change: Extend fare-breakdown and payout explanation flows.
Extend compliance status and document workflow clarity.
Extend trust and support routing for driver incidents.

deliveryChannels.change: Introduce updated driver app earnings and support experiences.
